{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230500070E184FFA40E1114326B9"}"},"total":559},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7475925435557020441","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看完的内容没狗血剧情，还是小清新。主角猫很可爱，有点类似于《回到过去变成(=^o^=)》中的黑炭猫猫。当然作者写的内容不同。(不知道番茄会不会允许提别家的文，这里就不打全名了。)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740630243,"group_id":"7451533645182946366","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+iJolQ3NWlxfJLheTwj1xr76Ls6Yj/u6jYsPOhtW3XA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9a91ec9e9d604058a9b785b72e8e5d71~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787749&x-signature=%2FaVT3EohZvZR2GvXa4fw7unRB0E%3D","user_id":"2054326839152944","user_name":"仙人掌旁边的松松"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2054326839152944","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7451533645182946366","book_info":{"abstract":"【不变人+慢热+日常+无CP+灵气复苏】
重生后竟然变成猫，还是一只快饿死的小猫。
危急时刻，觉醒系统。
提升技能，就能得到属性点；技能圆满就能获得技能点；获得成就，就能得到随机喵喵礼盒。
扑（入门10/10）→扑（熟练0/50），获得1个属性点。
埋屎（入门10/10）→埋屎（熟练0/50），获得1个属性点。
舔毛（圆满1000/1000）获得1个技能点。
“成就：打死一只变异老鼠，获得喵喵礼盒。”
“打开喵喵礼盒，获得技能镇煞。”
“打死一只饕餮，获得喵喵礼盒。”
“打开喵喵礼盒，获得技能吞天食地。”
但是，它真的只是被人收养能吃能睡性格懒散的小猫咪，可不是什么威震寰宇，让妖王俯首，鬼神低头的玄神。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o8eb8909c476f57738566a9ce210103e0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"春分谷雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7451533645182946366","book_name":"你真的认错了，本猫不是玄神！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#900000","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7451533824032260670","read_count":"11634","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1389905"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"668","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,重生,无女主,灵气复苏","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/74900dc11f10c5518373a9eb8be1ff36~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397207&x-signature=np5maD5ytnmPMRBz2untPEtpNRY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2612907015932328","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"123"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230500070E184FFA40E1114326B9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4
